title: Vietnamese Noodle Soup with Italian Twist
description: A fusion of Italian and Vietnamese flavors in this hearty noodle soup, perfect for a light lunch.
instructions: Heat 1 cup of water in a large pot over medium heat.
Add 3 cloves of minced garlic and 1 medium diced onion. Cook until softened.
Add 2 cups of vegetable broth and 2 tbsp of Vietnamese dish sauce.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add 200g of noodle and cook according to package instructions.
Stir in 1 tsp of intensely mustardy hot sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped herbs if desired.
